title: bursera inaguensis
intro: Bursera inaguensis is a plant species that belongs to the Burseraceae family, commonly known as the torchwood or palo de flores in some regions. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Bursera inaguensis may include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Bursera inaguensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, or essential oils, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
